title: Mediocre
text: Home * Engines * Mediocre Mediocre Mediocre , (Mediocre Chess) an UCI compliant chess engine by Jonatan Pettersson , written entirely in Java . Mediocre is the result of a chess programming blog, which describes aspects of the engine in detail [1] . Mediocre played the WCRCC 2007 and gained 7½ out of 14.
